module_info.docstring:
Utility functions for web scraping.

This module provides helper functions for extracting content, images,
and processing HTML from web pages.

functions.name: get_relevant_images
functions.docstring: Extract relevant images from the page

functions.name: parse_dimension
functions.docstring: Parse dimension value, handling px units

functions.name: extract_title
functions.docstring: Extract the title from the BeautifulSoup object

functions.name: get_image_hash
functions.docstring: Calculate a simple hash based on the image filename and essential query parameters

functions.name: clean_soup
functions.docstring: Clean the soup by removing unwanted tags

functions.name: get_text_from_soup
functions.docstring: Get the relevant text from the soup with improved filtering
